title: Deterministic Telegram-origin routing for post-restart completion
summary: Ensure restart completions triggered from Telegram are always routed back to Telegram by persisting Telegram identity fields and restoring origin-aware session context during boot.

affectedFiles.description: Add optional previousTelegramChatId and previousTelegramUserId to RestartContext and persist these fields when saving restart context.
Import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM, resolve deterministic post-restart context defaults, and restore Telegram identity fields/origin before post-restart completion routing.

diffPreview:
src/gateway/lifecycle.ts
- RestartContext gains previousTelegramChatId?: string and previousTelegramUserId?: number
- contextToPersist now includes previousTelegramChatId: sessionContext?.telegramChatId and previousTelegramUserId: sessionContext?.telegramUserId

src/gateway/boot.ts
- import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM from session-context
- replace conditional telegram/web block with resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId logic
- before routing log/context apply: if telegram channel or telegram origin, restore telegramChatId/telegramUserId and force origin to SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM
- expand routing log payload to include telegramChatId and telegramUserId
estimatedImpact: Prevents wrong-channel post-restart confirmations for Telegram-triggered restarts and makes restart completion routing deterministic across missing-session edge cases.
executorPrompt: Execute the approved src edit exactly as specified: 1) Update src/gateway/lifecycle.ts to extend RestartContext with previousTelegramChatId/previousTelegramUserId and include these fields in contextToPersist from sessionContext.telegramChatId/sessionContext.telegramUserId. 2) Update src/gateway/boot.ts to import SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM, replace the existing telegram-vs-else restart routing block with resolvedChannel/resolvedOrigin/resolvedSessionId logic (telegram fallback sessionId must be telegram-bootstrap), and add Telegram identity restoration (telegramChatId/telegramUserId plus origin force to SESSION_ORIGIN_TELEGRAM) before the routing logger call. 3) Keep all edits exact/minimal and type-safe. 4) Run npm run build. 5) Report changed files, build result, and a concise acceptance-check mapping against the listed tests.
